quotedUser.name: Readyclaw
quotedUser.text:
Welcome, Tencent. The more skill marketplaces, the better. 

But anyone “raising a lobster” deserves honesty: when we scanned 14,710 skills on ClawHub, only a few hundred were auto-flagged. We knew that was not safety, it just meant the scanner was blind.
